selections.name: Bf Dulce Sin Rage
selections.reason: Class advantage holds up well here; raw speed figure is legitimate and avoids the disparity cap penalty.

selections.name: Rr More
selections.reason: Huge raw speed figure of 115 is capped due to class disparity, but still projects as a major contender.

selections.name: Kvn Negro To Blanco
selections.reason: Solid class rating and consistent form makes him a reliable threat underneath.

selections.name: D Guy
selections.reason: Honest runner with figures that fit well in the exotics.

danger_horse.reason: Capable of a pop figure on best day.

selections.name: Lotsa Kitty

selections.name: Chica Tigre
selections.reason: Early speed type that will take pressure but has the class to hang around for a share.

selections.name: Jana Sue

selections.name: Lexithea

selections.name: Fourlynnes

selections.name: Tiger Lady

selections.name: Mom Says

selections.name: Mr Fabricator
selections.reason: Will contest the pace with the inside horse; class rating keeps him in the mix.

selections.name: Street Humor

danger_horse.name: Shudder

selections.name: Now Then

selections.reason: Sustained runner penalized slightly for the slow pace, but class is undeniable.

selections.name: Twelfth Night

danger_horse.name: Verdi

selections.name: Drive Train
